Package dev.yanianz.star.common

package dev.yanianz.star.common
This package holds some utility classes which are used in multiple other modules. This package/module is the base requirement for all other modules.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ChatColors
    This class contains some utilities related to ChatColor.
    CommonPatterns
    This class is created for common-use patterns used in things such as String.split(String).
    PlayerList
    Some utility methods dealing with the Player list.
    StarLogger
    A utility Logger implementation which automatically sets the Server as its parent Logger.
    StarTimings
     
    Validate
    This class is modified from Apache's commons-lang3 package.
